modlist.chip.dataMod.tooltip: This mod is a non-D2RMM data mod and may conflict with other mods or game updates. It is recommended to put it as high in the mod load order as possible.
modlist.delete.dialog.question: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
modlist.delete.dialog.warning: This will permanently remove the mod's files from your disk drive.
modlist.rename.dialog.label: Mod Name
modlist.nexusId.dialog.label: Nexus Mods ID
modlist.nexusId.dialog.hint: This ID can be found in the URL of the mod's Nexus Mods page.
install.tooltip.uninstall: Revert any files modified by the enabled mods back to their vanilla state.
run.tooltip: Run Diablo II: Resurrected by launching "{{command}}".
run.tooltip.unsaved: Install configuration has changed. Are you sure you want to run the game without triggering "Install Mods" first?
updater.notification.title: New Update Available
updater.notification.description: Do you want to update to version {{version}} of D2RMM?
updater.progress.title: Updating
collection.dialog.success.description.cr: Your collection has been created. You can manage it on Nexus Mods.
collection.dialog.success.description.up: Your collection has been updated. You can manage it on Nexus Mods.
collection.dialog.config.noConfig: No custom config for this mod
collection.toast.pleaseSelectCollection: Please select a collection to update.
settings.general.title: General
settings.general.gameDir.description: Specify the directory where Diablo II: Resurrected is installed. "D2R.exe" should be in this directory.
settings.general.gameDir.label: Game Directory
settings.general.gameDir.error: This doesn't look like a valid D2R game directory. Could not find D2R.exe inside.
settings.general.dataSource.description: Specify where D2RMM should pull the game's data from when installing mods.
settings.general.dataSource.label: Game Data Source
settings.general.dataDir.description: Specify the location of the directory that contains pre-extracted data from Diablo II: Resurrected.
settings.general.dataDir.label: Data Directory
settings.general.dataDir.error: This doesn't look like a valid D2R game data directory. Could not find the global directory inside. Are you sure you extracted the game data to this directory using CascView?
settings.general.dataDir.sameAsOutput: It looks like you are reading pre-extracted game data from the same directory that D2RMM will generate output modded files into ("{{path}}"). Are you sure you want to do this? This will most likely lead to completely broken behavior.
settings.general.outputModName.descripti: Specify the name of the Diablo II: Resurrected MPQ data mod that D2RMM will generate when mods are installed.
settings.general.outputModName.label: Output Mod Name
settings.general.outputModName.empty: The Output Mod Name is empty. This will almost certainly break your game. Are you sure this is right?
settings.general.savesPath.description: Specify where D2RMM should read save files from when installing mods.
settings.general.savesPath.label: Save Data Path
settings.general.savesPath.outsideBase: Your save path is not within “{{path}}\”. Are you sure this is right?
settings.general.outputPath.info: Generated files will be located in “{{path}}\”.
settings.general.savesLocation.info: Save game files and user preferences will be located in “{{path}}\”.
settings.general.installBeforeRun.descri: Automatically install mods before running the game (when using "Run D2R" button).
settings.directMode.title: Direct Mode
settings.directMode.description: Instead of generating files in <D2R>/mods/, generate them in <D2R>/data/ so that you can use -direct -txt when running the game. You will still need to manually extract game data to <D2R>/data/ using CascView in order to use "-direct" with Diablo II: Resurrected.
settings.directMode.outputPath: Generated files will be located in “{{path}}\”.
settings.directMode.warning: Do not turn this on if you do not know what you are doing.
settings.launcher.title: Game Launcher
settings.launcher.description: Specify the extra arguments you'd like to pass to Diablo II: Resurrected when starting it via D2RMM.
settings.launcher.extraArgs.label: Extra Game Args
settings.display.title: Display
settings.display.theme.label: Theme
settings.display.language.label: Language
settings.nexus.title: Nexus Mods
settings.nexus.signedOut: You are not signed in to Nexus Mods. You will not be able to check for mod updates or download mod updates directly via D2RMM (for premium Nexus Mods users).
settings.nexus.free.tooltip: Free users cannot initiate mod downloads from within D2RMM. You must go to Nexus Mods website in order to download or update mods.
settings.nexus.nxm.registered: D2RMM is registered as the handler for nxm:// URLs.
settings.nexus.nxm.notRegistered: D2RMM is not registered as the handler for nxm:// URLs. You will not be able to download mods directly via D2RMM when using Mod Manager links on Nexus Mods.
settings.updates.title: Updates
settings.updates.available: New Update Available — Do you want to update to version {{version}} of D2RMM?
ed2r.warning.title: Experimental Save Editor — Use with Caution
ed2r.warning.body: This save editor is experimental. Back up your save files before making changes. Data loss or corruption may occur.
ed2r.tooltip.unsaved: This file has been modified but has not been saved yet.
ed2r.tooltip.backup: Your save file will also be backed up for you.
ed2r.tooltip.realmDowngrade: You can try downgrading realm if you want, but it'll probably result in a broken save file.
ed2r.field.name: Name
worker.ed2r.readCharacterFailed: Failed to read character save data from "{{name}}".
worker.ed2r.readStashFailed: Failed to read stash save data from "{{name}}".
worker.ed2r.categoryNotFound: Could not find category for item code "{{code}}".
worker.ed2r.spriteConvertFailed: Could not convert sprite file to data URI for item code "{{code}}".
worker.fileManager.writeWithoutRead.conf: Mod "{{mod}}" is modifying file "{{filePath}}" without reading it first. This file was previously modified by {{mods}} and these changes will be lost. Consider moving "{{mod}}" higher in the load order.
worker.fileManager.writeWithoutRead.noCo: Mod "{{mod}}" is modifying file "{{filePath}}" without reading it first. No other mods have written to this file, but make sure to update this mod whenever Diablo II updates.
updater.log.cleanupFailed: Failed to clean up temporary directory.
main.worker.catastrophicFailure: Catastrophic failure! Worker exited with code {{code}} ({{signal}}). You should restart D2RMM.
